biological_replicate: Variability in peak identification during mass spectrometry data collection may also contribute to the apparent heterogeneity in phosphorylation sites.
experimental_design: we further analyze the effect of phosphorylation by comparing the activities of the phosphorylated (P) and phosphatase (CIP)-treated dephosphorylated (deP) forms of SMARCAD1.
factor_value: comparing the activities of the phosphorylated (P) and phosphatase (CIP)-treated dephosphorylated (deP) forms of SMARCAD1.
